title: Interactive Star Rating

statement.markdown:
## Interactive Star Rating Component

Build a 5-star interactive rating component.

### Requirements:
1. **Hover State**: Hovering over a star should temporarily highlight it and all preceding stars (e.g. adding a class `text-yellow-400`).
2. **Click Selection**: Clicking a star selects that rating and updates the visual display text container.
3. **Mouse Leave**: Moving the mouse out of the stars container should restore the highlight to the last selected rating (or 0 if none has been clicked).

constraints: Must track the state of both selected rating and current hovered index
Must use mouse event handlers (mouseover, click, mouseleave)

gradingCriteria.description: Verify rating updates cleanly upon click events.
Verify dynamic highlight updates on hover and resets properly on mouseleave.
